(trfs s)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (id_right v₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs (trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂) =
(trfs s)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (id_right v₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂ =
(trfs s)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (id_right v₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
(trfs s)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (id_right v₂) = trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
(trfs s)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (id_right v₂) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
?b = trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
(trfs s)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (id_right v₂) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (id_right v₂) = ?t2

      apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
(trfs s) ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v identity_v y₂)) =
trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs s
     ⋆h (trfs (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v identity_v y₂))) =
trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs s ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v identity_v y₂)) =
trfs s ⋆h id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v identity_v y₂)) =
s ⋆h id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v identity_v y₂) =
id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square (identity_v y₂) =
id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_v_square (identity_h y₂) =
id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs (trbs id_h_square v₂) = id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs (trfs id_h_square v₂) = id_h_square v₂

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
trfs id_h_square v₂ = id_h_square v₂

    apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_runitor transpose_hor_id transpose_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_runitor transpose_hor_id transpose_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_runitor_data transpose_hor_id
  transpose_hor_comp
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_runitor_laws ?l

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_runitor_data transpose_hor_id
  transpose_hor_comp
 exact transpose_runitor_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_runitor_laws transpose_runitor_data
 exact transpose_runitor_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 8. The associator *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_data transpose_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_data transpose_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w, x, y, z: transpose_category
v₁: transpose_twosided_disp_cat w x
v₂: transpose_twosided_disp_cat x y
v₃: transpose_twosided_disp_cat y z
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso w)
  (identity_z_iso z) (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃))
  ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w, x, y, z: transpose_category
v₁: transpose_twosided_disp_cat w x
v₂: transpose_twosided_disp_cat x y
v₃: transpose_twosided_disp_cat y z
transportf
  (λ z0 : transpose_category,
   transpose_twosided_disp_cat z0 z) (idpath w)
  (transportf
     (λ z : transpose_category,
      transpose_twosided_disp_cat w z) (idpath z)
     (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃))) = (v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃

    apply assoc.
  Defined.

  Arguments transpose_associator_data /.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_laws transpose_associator_data

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_laws transpose_associator_data

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (w₁ w₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : pr111 (pr1 C))
(h₁ : w₁ -->v x₁) (h₂ : w₂ -->v x₂) (j₁ : x₁ -->v y₁)
(j₂ : x₂ -->v y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->v z₁) (k₂ : y₂ -->v z₂)
(vw : (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂)
(vx : (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂)
(vy : (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂)
(vz : (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂)
(τ₁ : square h₁ h₂ vw vx) (τ₂ : square j₁ j₂ vx vy)
(τ₃ : square k₁ k₂ vy vz),
trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
       (assoc h₁ j₁ k₁) ⋆h (τ₁ ⋆v τ₂ ⋆v τ₃) =
(τ₁ ⋆v (τ₂ ⋆v τ₃))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc h₂ j₂ k₂)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
       (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
(s₁ ⋆v (s₂ ⋆v s₃))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
       (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (runitor_globular_iso_square h₁) @
        ! globular_iso_square_to_path
            (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁))
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
          (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! (globular_iso_square_to_path
                (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄) @
              ! globular_iso_square_to_path
                  (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄))) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (runitor_globular_iso_square h₁) @
        ! globular_iso_square_to_path
            (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁))
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
          (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! (! globular_iso_square_to_path
                  (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) @
           ! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (runitor_globular_iso_square h₁) @
        ! globular_iso_square_to_path
            (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁))
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
          (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (globular_iso_square_to_path
             (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄) @
           ! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
             (globular_iso_square_to_path
                (runitor_globular_iso_square h₁))
           ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
                (! globular_iso_square_to_path
                     (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)))
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
          (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (globular_iso_square_to_path
             (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄) @
           ! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
             (globular_iso_square_to_path
                (runitor_globular_iso_square h₁))
           ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
                (! globular_iso_square_to_path
                     (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)))
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
          (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (globular_iso_square_to_path
             (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄) @
           ! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) = 
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
?b =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

                (runitor_globular_iso_square h₁))
           ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square

                     (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)))
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
           ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
           ⋆v (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁)
                 (idpath z₁) (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅)
               ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
               ⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
                   ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                        (runitor_globular_iso_square
                           h₄)))) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
     ⋆v (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
           (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
         ⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
             ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                  (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄))) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

v₃: x₁ -->v y₁

v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂

h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂

s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄

     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv

     ⋆v (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
           (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
         ⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
             ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                  (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄))) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)

v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂

v₆: y₂ -->v z₂

h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂

s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂

s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
?b =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
  (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
    ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
         (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₁) (idpath z₁)
  (assoc v₁ v₃ v₅) = ?y'

      apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
     ⋆v ((trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₃ ·v v₅)))
         ⋆h (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
         ⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
             ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                  (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄))) =
(trbs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄

     ⋆v ((trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₃ ·v v₅))
               ⋆h (trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃))
         ⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄

                  (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄))) =

⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

v₆: y₂ -->v z₂

h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂

⋆v (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
    ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
         (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) = ?t2

      apply square_assoc_v.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁

v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂

     ⋆v (trbs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₃ ·v v₅))
              ⋆h (trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
              ⋆v lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
              ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                   (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =

⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁

h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
     ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₃ ·v v₅))
              ⋆h (trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
              ⋆v lunitor_globular_iso_square h₄
              ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                   (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂

     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv

         ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
              (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
     ⋆v (lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
         ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
              (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) = 
?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
     (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
⋆v (lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
    ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
         (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
?t2 =
runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
     (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
⋆v (lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
    ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
         (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄))

      apply square_assoc_v'.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
           ⋆v (globular_iso_square_inv
                 (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
               ⋆v (lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
                   ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                        (runitor_globular_iso_square
                           h₄)))) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

globular_iso_square_inv
  (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
⋆v (lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)) = ?y'

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
     ⋆v ((trbs globular_iso_square_inv
                 (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
               ⋆v lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃))
         ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
              (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
     ⋆v ((trfs globular_iso_square_inv
                 (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁)
               ⋆v lunitor_h h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃))
         ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
              (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

v₄: x₂ -->v y₂

v₆: y₂ -->v z₂

h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂

s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
globular_iso_square_inv
  (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁) ⋆v lunitor_h h₁
⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
     (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄) = ?t2

v₄: x₂ -->v y₂

v₆: y₂ -->v z₂

globular_iso_square_inv
  (lunitor_globular_iso_square h₁) ⋆v lunitor_h h₁ =
?y'

      apply linvunitor_lunitor_h.

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trbs runitor_globular_iso_square h₁
           ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
           ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
     (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
runitor_globular_iso_square h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃) =
?y'

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
?y' =
runitor_globular_iso_square h₁ ⋆v (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)

      apply (runitor_square' (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
           ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)
           ⋆v runitor_h h₄)
     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
runitor_h h₄
⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
     (runitor_globular_iso_square h₄) = ?t2

      apply runitor_rinvunitor_h.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)
     ⋆v (trbs id_v_square (h₄ ·h identity_h z₂)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄

     ⋆v (trfs id_v_square (h₄ ·h identity_h z₂)) =

HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
           ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)
           ⋆v id_v_square (h₄ ·h identity_h z₂)) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat

v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂

h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)
     ⋆v id_v_square (h₄ ·h identity_h z₂) =
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆)

     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
?b =
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
     (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w₂) (idpath z₂)
  (assoc v₂ v₄ v₆) = ?t2

      apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
(trfs s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₄ ·v v₆))) =
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h (trfs (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₄ ·v v₆)))) =
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₄ ·v v₆))) =
trfs (s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
     ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
(s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃)
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₄ ·v v₆))) =
(s₁ ⋆v s₂ ⋆v s₃) ⋆h id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₄ ·v v₆)) =
id_h_square ((v₂ ·v v₄) ·v v₆)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs id_h_square v₂
     ⋆v (id_h_square v₄ ⋆v id_h_square v₆) =
id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄ ⋆v id_h_square v₆

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trbs id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄
           ⋆v id_h_square v₆) =
id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄ ⋆v id_h_square v₆

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs (trfs id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄
           ⋆v id_h_square v₆) =
id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄ ⋆v id_h_square v₆

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: w₁ -->v x₁
v₂: w₂ -->v x₂
v₃: x₁ -->v y₁
v₄: x₂ -->v y₂
v₅: y₁ -->v z₁
v₆: y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: (pr121 (pr11 C)) w₁ w₂
h₂: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x₁ x₂
h₃: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y₁ y₂
h₄: (pr121 (pr11 C)) z₁ z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₃ v₄ h₂ h₃
s₃: square v₅ v₆ h₃ h₄
trfs id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄
     ⋆v id_h_square v₆ =
id_h_square v₂ ⋆v id_h_square v₄ ⋆v id_h_square v₆

    apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_associator transpose_hor_comp

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_associator transpose_hor_comp

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_data transpose_hor_comp
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_laws ?a

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_data transpose_hor_comp
 exact transpose_associator_data.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_associator_laws transpose_associator_data
 exact transpose_associator_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 9. The triangle and pentagon equations *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
triangle_law transpose_lunitor transpose_runitor
  transpose_associator

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
triangle_law transpose_lunitor transpose_runitor
  transpose_associator

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (x y z : transpose_category)
(h : transpose_twosided_disp_cat x y)
(k : transpose_twosided_disp_cat y z),
double_associator transpose_associator h
  (double_id transpose_hor_id y) k ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                         transpose_hor_comp
                                         (double_runitor
                                            transpose_runitor
                                            h)
                                         (id_two_disp
                                            k) =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor transpose_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor transpose_lunitor k)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (x y z : transpose_category)
(h : transpose_twosided_disp_cat x y)
(k : transpose_twosided_disp_cat y z),
pr1 transpose_associator x y y z h
  (double_id transpose_hor_id y) k ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                         transpose_hor_comp
                                         (pr1
                                            transpose_runitor
                                            x y h)
                                         (id_two_disp
                                            k) =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor transpose_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h) (pr1 transpose_lunitor y z k)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (x y z : pr111 (pr1 C)) (h : x -->v y)
(k : y -->v z),
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath z)
  (assoc h (identity_v y) k)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
      (id_right h) ⋆v id_h_square k) =
trb₂ id_h_square h
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath y) (idpath z)
          (id_left k)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath z)
  (assoc v (identity_v y) w)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
      (id_right v) ⋆v id_h_square w) =
trb₂ id_h_square v
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath y) (idpath z)
          (id_left w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath z)
  (assoc v (identity_v y) w)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
      (id_right v) ⋆v id_h_square w) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
?b =
trb₂ id_h_square v
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath y) (idpath z)
          (id_left w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath z)
  (assoc v (identity_v y) w)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
      (id_right v) ⋆v id_h_square w) = ?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath z)
  (assoc v (identity_v y) w) = ?y'

      apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.

w: y -->v z

⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
      (id_right v) ⋆v id_h_square w) =
trb₂ id_h_square v
     ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath y) (idpath z)
          (id_left w)

⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
      (id_right v) ⋆v id_h_square w) = ?b

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trb₂ id_h_square v
     ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (identity_v y ·v w)) =
(trfs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w)))
⋆h ((trfs id_h_square (v ·v identity_v y))
    ⋆v id_h_square w)

w: y -->v z

       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (lunitor_globular_iso_square (identity_h x)))
     ⋆v (id_h_square v
         ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (identity_v y ·v w)))
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (lunitor_globular_iso_square
                  (identity_h z))) =
(trfs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w)))
⋆h ((trfs id_h_square (v ·v identity_v y))
    ⋆v id_h_square w)

     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (lunitor_globular_iso_square
                  (identity_h z))) = ?b

                (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)) =
(trfs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v ·v identity_v y)
         ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v
         ⋆v id_h_square (identity_v y ·v w))
     ⋆v id_v_square (identity_h z ·h identity_h z) =
(trfs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v ·v identity_v y)
         ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat

v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (trbs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w))
           ⋆h (id_h_square v
               ⋆v id_h_square (identity_v y ·v w))) =
(trfs id_h_square (v ·v (identity_v y ·v w)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v ·v identity_v y)
         ⋆v id_h_square w)

     ⋆h (id_h_square v

⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v ·v identity_v y)
         ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (id_h_square v
      ⋆v (id_h_square (identity_v y) ⋆v id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v
         ⋆v (id_h_square (identity_v y)
             ⋆v id_h_square w)) =
(trfs id_h_square v
      ⋆v (id_h_square (identity_v y) ⋆v id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square (identity_v y)
         ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (id_h_square v
      ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h y) ⋆v id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v
         ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h y)
             ⋆v id_h_square w)) =
(trfs id_h_square v
      ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h y) ⋆v id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_v_square (identity_h y)
         ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (id_h_square v
      ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h y) ⋆v id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v
         ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h y)
             ⋆v id_h_square w)) =
(trfs id_h_square v
      ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h y) ⋆v id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs (trbs id_h_square v) ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (id_h_square v ⋆v (trbs id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v (trbs id_h_square w)) =
(trfs id_h_square v ⋆v (trbs id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs (trbs id_h_square v) ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (id_h_square v ⋆v (trfs id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v (trfs id_h_square w)) =
(trfs id_h_square v ⋆v (trfs id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs (trfs id_h_square v) ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (id_h_square v ⋆v (trfs id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v (trfs id_h_square w)) =
(trfs id_h_square v ⋆v (trfs id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w) =
(trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w))
⋆h (trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w) =
(trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
⋆h (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w))
           ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)) =
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w))
     ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
     ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w) =
trfs (trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
     ⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
(trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w) =
(trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)
⋆h (id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w =
trfs id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v: x -->v y
w: y -->v z
id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w =
id_h_square v ⋆v id_h_square w

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
pentagon_law transpose_associator

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
pentagon_law transpose_associator

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (v w x y z : pr111 (pr1 C)) (h₁ : v -->v w)
(h₂ : w -->v x) (h₃ : x -->v y) (h₄ : y -->v z),
trb₂ double_associator transpose_associator h₁ h₂
       (h₃ ·v h₄)
     ⋆h double_associator transpose_associator
          (h₁ ·v h₂) h₃ h₄ =
(id_h_square h₁
 ⋆v double_associator transpose_associator h₂ h₃ h₄)
⋆h double_associator transpose_associator h₁
     (h₂ ·v h₃) h₄
⋆h (double_associator transpose_associator h₁ h₂ h₃
    ⋆v id_h_square h₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (v w x y z : pr111 (pr1 C)) (h₁ : v -->v w)
(h₂ : w -->v x) (h₃ : x -->v y) (h₄ : y -->v z),
trb₂ pr1 transpose_associator v w x z h₁ h₂ (h₃ ·v h₄)
     ⋆h pr1 transpose_associator v x y z (h₁ ·v h₂) h₃
          h₄ =
(id_h_square h₁
 ⋆v pr1 transpose_associator w x y z h₂ h₃ h₄)
⋆h pr1 transpose_associator v w y z h₁ (h₂ ·v h₃) h₄
⋆h (pr1 transpose_associator v w x y h₁ h₂ h₃
    ⋆v id_h_square h₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
∏ (v w x y z : pr111 (pr1 C)) (h₁ : v -->v w)
(h₂ : w -->v x) (h₃ : x -->v y) (h₄ : y -->v z),
trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
       (assoc h₁ h₂ (h₃ ·v h₄))
     ⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
          (assoc (h₁ ·v h₂) h₃ h₄) =
(id_h_square h₁
 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc h₂ h₃ h₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc h₁ (h₂ ·v h₃) h₄)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath y)
      (assoc h₁ h₂ h₃) ⋆v id_h_square h₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
       (assoc v₁ v₂ (v₃ ·v v₄))
     ⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
          (assoc (v₁ ·v v₂) v₃ v₄) =
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath y)
      (assoc v₁ v₂ v₃) ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
       (assoc v₁ v₂ (v₃ ·v v₄))
     ⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
          (assoc (v₁ ·v v₂) v₃ v₄) = ?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
?b =
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath y)
      (assoc v₁ v₂ v₃) ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

       (assoc v₁ v₂ (v₃ ·v v₄))
     ⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
          (assoc (v₁ ·v v₂) v₃ v₄) = ?b

     (assoc (v₁ ·v v₂) v₃ v₄) = ?t2

HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)

  (assoc v₁ v₂ (v₃ ·v v₄))

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w

v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
  (assoc (v₁ ·v v₂) v₃ v₄) = ?t20

        apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
  (assoc v₁ v₂ (v₃ ·v v₄))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))) = 
?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
  (assoc v₁ v₂ (v₃ ·v v₄)) = ?y'

      apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trb₂ (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))) =
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄)
⋆h (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath y)
      (assoc v₁ v₂ v₃) ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄)

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath y)
  (assoc v₁ v₂ v₃) = ?y'

        apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄)
⋆h ((trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)))
    ⋆v id_h_square v₄) = ?b

      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄) = ?y'

 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath v) (idpath z)
     (assoc v₁ (v₂ ·v v₃) v₄) = ?b

 ⋆v idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
      (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄))) =

C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w

idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath w) (idpath z)
  (assoc v₂ v₃ v₄) = ?t2

      apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_transpose.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄)))
⋆h ((trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)))
    ⋆v id_h_square v₄) =
trb₂ (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄)))
⋆h ((trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)))
    ⋆v id_h_square v₄) =
trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (runitor_globular_iso_square
             (identity_h v ·h identity_h v)))
     ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
        ⋆h (trfs id_h_square
                   ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square
                  (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)))

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (runitor_globular_iso_square
             (identity_h v ·h identity_h v)))
     ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
        ⋆h (trfs id_h_square
                   ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square
                  (identity_h z ·h identity_h z))) =
(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄)))
⋆h ((trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)))
    ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)

v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs path_to_globular_iso_square
       (globular_iso_square_to_path
          (runitor_globular_iso_square
             (identity_h v ·h identity_h v)))
     ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
        ⋆h (trfs id_h_square
                   ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆v path_to_globular_iso_square
          (! globular_iso_square_to_path
               (runitor_globular_iso_square
                  (identity_h z ·h identity_h z))) =
?b

(id_h_square v₁
 ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄)))

path_to_globular_iso_square
  (! globular_iso_square_to_path
       (runitor_globular_iso_square
          (identity_h z ·h identity_h z))) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_double_cat

v₃: x -->v y

  (! globular_iso_square_to_path
       (runitor_globular_iso_square
          (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)))

      apply path_to_globular_iso_square_inv.

     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (path_to_globular_iso_square
             (globular_iso_square_to_path
                (runitor_globular_iso_square
                   (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)))) =

 ⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄)))

    ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

  (identity_h v ·h identity_h v)
⋆v (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
   ⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))

      apply (runitor_square' (C := C)).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square
                   (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
           ⋆h (trfs id_h_square
                      ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
           ⋆h id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)
           ⋆v runitor_h (identity_h z ·h identity_h z))
     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
          (runitor_globular_iso_square
             (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)) =
(trfs id_h_square v₁ ⋆v id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v ((v₂ ·v v₃) ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃))
         ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

           ⋆h (trfs id_h_square
                      ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
           ⋆h id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)
           ⋆v runitor_h (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)
           ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                (runitor_globular_iso_square
                   (identity_h z ·h identity_h z))) =

         ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆h id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)

     ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv

         ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs (trfs (trfs id_h_square
                   (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
           ⋆h (trfs id_h_square
                      ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
           ⋆h id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)
           ⋆v (runitor_h
                 (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)
               ⋆v globular_iso_square_inv
                    (runitor_globular_iso_square
                       (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)))) =
(trfs id_h_square v₁ ⋆v id_h_square (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))

⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃))
         ⋆v id_h_square v₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w

     ⋆v (runitor_h (identity_h z ·h identity_h z)

              (runitor_globular_iso_square
                 (identity_h z ·h identity_h z))) =

v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)

v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄)) = 
?b

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄) = ?t2

      apply transportf_square_id_h_square_eq'.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄)) =
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
⋆h id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
(v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄ = ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))) =
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄) =
trfs id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
(v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄ = ((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄
 abstract
        (rewrite !assocl_v ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))) =
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))

HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))) =
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))

v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y

     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))) =
?b
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
?b =
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))) =
?b

        
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
?b =
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
     ⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))

        apply (transportf_hcomp_r (idpath _)).
      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
pr2 (hor_id_double_cat C) v z
  (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))) =
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))
⋆h (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs (trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))) =
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))) =
trfs id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄))) =
id_h_square (v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v (v₃ ·v v₄)))

      apply idpath.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
v, w, x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
v₁: v -->v w
v₂: w -->v x
v₃: x -->v y
v₄: y -->v z
trfs id_h_square ((v₁ ·v (v₂ ·v v₃)) ·v v₄) =
trfs id_h_square (((v₁ ·v v₂) ·v v₃) ·v v₄)
 apply transportf_square_id_h_square_eq.
  Qed.

  (** * 10. The dual double category *)
  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
category
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
twosided_disp_cat ?C ?C
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
hor_id ?D
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
hor_comp ?D
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_lunitor ?I ?Cm
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_runitor ?I ?Cm
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_associator ?Cm
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
triangle_law ?l ?r ?a
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
pentagon_law ?a

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
category
 exact transpose_category.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
twosided_disp_cat transpose_category
  transpose_category
 exact transpose_twosided_disp_cat.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
hor_id transpose_twosided_disp_cat
 exact transpose_hor_id.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
hor_comp transpose_twosided_disp_cat
 exact transpose_hor_comp.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_lunitor transpose_hor_id transpose_hor_comp
 exact transpose_lunitor.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_runitor transpose_hor_id transpose_hor_comp
 exact transpose_runitor.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
double_cat_associator transpose_hor_comp
 exact transpose_associator.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
triangle_law transpose_lunitor transpose_runitor
  transpose_associator
 exact transpose_triangle_law.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
pentagon_law transpose_associator
 exact transpose_pentagon_law.
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
univalent_double_cat

  
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
univalent_double_cat

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
double_cat
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
is_univalent_double_cat ?C

    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
double_cat
 exact transpose_double_cat.
    
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
is_univalent_double_cat transpose_double_cat
 
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
is_univalent transpose_double_cat
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor transpose_double_cat)

      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
is_univalent transpose_double_cat
 exact HC'.
      
C: univalent_double_cat
HC: ∏ x y : C, isaset (x -->h y)
HC': is_univalent transpose_category
HC'': is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  transpose_twosided_disp_cat
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  (hor_mor transpose_double_cat)
 exact HC''.
  Defined.
End TransposePseudoDoubleCat.

(** * 11. Symmetric univalence for double categories *)
Definition symmetric_univalent
           (C : univalent_double_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (HC : ∏ (x y : C), isaset (x -->h y)),
     is_univalent (transpose_category C HC)
     ×
     is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat (transpose_twosided_disp_cat C HC).

Definition make_symmetric_univalent
           {C : univalent_double_cat}
           (H₁ : ∏ (x y : C), isaset (x -->h y))
           (H₂ : is_univalent (transpose_category C H₁))
           (H₃ : is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat (transpose_twosided_disp_cat C H₁))
  : symmetric_univalent C
  := H₁ ,, H₂ ,, H₃.
